prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-DHCSDBS-6PC Product Type: DRILL_BITS Brand (from catalog): Universal Tool Existing Title: 6pc Diamond Coated 80 Grit Hole Saw Bits Universal Drill Bit Rotary Tools, 1/4" Shank Description: This 6 pc Diamond Hole Saw Set is Great for Construction, Home Improvement, Hobbies, Arts and Crafts, & More.

Used for Cutting Holes in Tile, Glass, Marble, Gemstones, Slate, etc...

6pc Diamond Hole Saw Sizes 5/32", 3/16", 1/4", 5/16, 3/8" & 1/2"

Each Drill Bit Saw has a Shank Size of 1/8" and is Nickel Plated with Diamond Coated Tips for Superior Cutting Performance.

The Shank size refers to the size of the interior hole rather then the size of the exterior shank. Search Terms: construction home improvement hobby tools Features: - Sizes: 5/32", 3/16", 1/4", 5/16, 3/8" & 1/2" - Shank Size: 1/8" - Nickel Plated - Diamond Coated for Superior Performance - Great for Construction, Home Improvement, Hobby, Crafts & More! === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Universal Tool 6-pc Diamond Coated Hole Saw Bits

openai.item_name: Universal Tool 6-pc 80 Grit Diamond Hole Saw Drill Bit Set

tokens.name: Diamond Hole Saw Drill Bit Set

anthropic.title_differentiation: 6 Sizes 532" To 12", 18" Shank, Diamond Coated Tips, Tile Glass Marble, Nickel Plated, Rotary Tool Compatible

openai.title_differentiation: One Eighth Inch Shank, Nickel Plated, Cuts Tile Glass Marble Gemstones And Slate, For Construction Home Improvement And Crafts
